TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Hans-Adam II == ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Hans-Adam II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Liechtenstein ta' misuw hya' ga Hans-Adam II, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1989 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Hans-Adam II maki tay kawas 1967 msqun ki Marie, Princess of Liechtenstein, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ńßans~…ē-a*am ii == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ńßans~…ē-a*am ii, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw lie ¶~ ®ńßtens~…ētein ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßans~…ē-a*am ii, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan nja ńßans~…ē-a*am ii maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki marie, prin ¶~ ®es~…ēs~…ē o* lie ¶~ ®ńßtens~…ētein, teńßuk mis~…ēuw qani. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Hans-Adam II == ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Hans-Adam II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Liechtenstein ta' misuw hya' ga Hans-Adam II, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1989 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Hans-Adam II maki tay kawas 1967 msqun ki Marie, Princess of Liechtenstein, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ńßans~…ē-a*am ii == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ńßans~…ē-a*am ii, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw lie ¶~ ®ńßtens~…ētein ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßans~…ē-a*am ii, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan nja ńßans~…ē-a*am ii maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki marie, prin ¶~ ®es~…ēs~…ē o* lie ¶~ ®ńßtens~…ētein, teńßuk mis~…ēuw qani. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
